snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

We will update you if the plan changes.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

Relive the magic of Bollywood romance with "Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka", a timeless melody from the blockbuster movie . Sung by the legendary voices of Kumar Sanu and Alka Yagnik, this evergreen rain song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and monsoon romance.

Featuring Akshay Kumar, Priyanka Chopra, and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most cherished romantic tracks of the 2000s.

Movie: Andaaz (2003)
Song: Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka 
Starring: Akshay Kumar, Lara Dutta, and Priyanka Chopra
Singer: Alka Yagnik, Babul Supriyo
Music: Nadeem Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Directed by: Raj Kanwar

snippet.title: Shrek 5 - Official Teaser Trailer (2027) Mike Myers, Zendaya, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz
snippet.description:
Check out the teaser trailer for Shrek 5, an upcoming magical comedy adventure animated film from DreamWorks Animation. Shrek 5 stars Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, and Cameron Diaz as they return to their signature roles as Shrek, Donkey and Fiona. Zendaya joins the cast as Shrek and Fiona’s daughter Felicia, along with Marcello Hernandez and Skyler Gisondo as Felicia’s brothers, Fergus and Farkle. Shrek 5 opens in theaters in summer 2027.

Shrek 5 is directed by acclaimed filmmakers and Shrek franchise veterans Conrad Vernon and Walt Dohrn. Vernon was a member of the directing team on the Academy Award nominated Shrek 2 as well as on DreamWorks Animation’s Madagascar 3: Europe’s Most Wanted and Monsters vs. Aliens. Vernon has also provided the voice of Shrek fan-favorite Gingerbread Man, aka “Gingy,” across all titles in the Shrek Universe. Dohrn worked on the second and third Shrek films as a writer and artist and as Head of Story on the fourth film. Dohrn also voiced the character of Rumpelstiltskin in Shrek Forever After. Dohrn served as co-director on the first Trolls film and directed Trolls World Tour and Trolls Band Together. 

The film is produced by returning producer Gina Shay (Trolls franchise), who produced Shrek Forever After and by Illumination CEO and Academy Award nominee Chris Meledandri (the Super Mario, Despicable Me and Minions franchises). The film is co-directed by Brad Ableson (Minions: The Rise of Gru, The Simpsons).

#Shrek5 #Movies #IGN

snippet.title: Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den Official Trailer | Overwatch
snippet.description:
Are you ready to step Into the Tiger’s Den?

A new chapter in the Reign of Talon starts here with the arrival of our newest Damage Hero, Shion. As the Hashimoto Clan’s most terrifying elder, Shion brings a dangerous new arsenal to the battlefield with her dual semi-auto pistols and a motorcycle she can crash into her enemies.

Battle through the streets of Tokyo in the all-new Hybrid Map, Neon Junction, filled with nods to Japanese culture and easter eggs around every corner. Tokyo also comes to life in our new Anima Strike Meta Event where you earn new rewards based on which path you choose to go down.

That’s not all though! Unlock brand new cosmetics through the Season 3 Battle Pass and in the Shop like Illari’s Ascendant Phoenix Mythic Hero Skin, Hanzo’s Tokyo Rebel Mythic Weapon Skin, new Ultra Skins with added VFX, new skins as part of our upcoming YOASOBI collaboration, and much more.

Experience all that Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den has to offer when it arrives in-game TOMORROW.

Overwatch is free to play on PC and console, including Nintendo Switch™ 2
_

snippet.title: Lesti - Kura Kura Dalam Perahu | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
#KuraKuraDalamPerahu #Lesti #3dentertainment 

Perjalanan diva dangdut muda Lesti menuju titik kariernya saat ini bukanlah sesuatu yang mudah. Dari panggung kecil ke panggung kecil lainnya, Lesti menjalani proses panjang penuh perjuangan hingga berhasil menjadi salah satu penyanyi dangdut ternama di Indonesia.

Sosok yang menjadi saksi hidup perjalanan tersebut adalah sang ayah, Endang Mulyana atau yang akrab dikenal sebagai Ayah Kejora. Ia menyaksikan langsung transformasi Lesti, dari seorang gadis sederhana asal Cianjur hingga kini menjadi penyanyi dangdut papan atas yang telah merilis puluhan karya.

Pada 17 Juni 2026, Lesti bersama label rekamannya, 3D Entertainment, resmi merilis single ke-31 bertajuk “Kura Kura Dalam Perahu”. Mulai pukul 00.00 WIB, lagu ini sudah dapat dinikmati di berbagai platform musik digital seperti Apple Music, Spotify, YouTube Music, TikTok, dan FB Music. Sementara itu, video musik lagu tersebut tayang pada hari yang sama melalui kanal YouTube 3D Entertainment pukul 16.00 WIB.

Saat pertama kali mendengarkan demo lagu “Kura Kura Dalam Perahu”, Lesti mengaku langsung jatuh hati. Lagu ciptaan Adibal Sahrul ini dinilai memiliki harmoni musik khas dengan lirik penuh makna dan kiasan yang unik.
“Ketika aku dikasih lagu ini sama Kak Adi, aku langsung suka karena musiknya enak, liriknya juga penuh kiasan. Aku sampai mikir, kok bisa ya Kak Adi kepikiran bikin lirik seperti ‘untuk apa kau semai benih di batu karang, mana mungkin tumbuh mekar dan berkembang’,” ujar Lesti.
Menariknya, sebelum resmi dirilis, Lesti terlebih dahulu meminta pendapat sang ayah mengenai lagu tersebut. Ia mengaku memiliki kebiasaan selalu meminta masukan dari Ayah Kejora setiap kali hendak merilis karya baru.
“Pas tahu single ini mau rilis, aku nanya dulu ke Bapak pendapatnya tentang lagu ini gimana. Aku memang punya kebiasaan kalau mau rilis lagu selalu tanya pendapat Bapak. Dan ternyata beliau suka sama lagu ini, makanya aku jadi makin yakin single ini akan jadi sesuatu,” tambah Lesti.

Proses pengambilan gambar video musik dilakukan di sebuah studio di kawasan Jakarta Selatan. Untuk konsep video klip, Lesti menyerahkan penggarapannya kepada tim produksi, namun tetap memberikan sentuhan personal sesuai karakter yang ia inginkan.
“Konsep music videonya aku serahin ke PH. Pokoknya aku mau yang dramatis tapi tetap kelihatan cantik. Alhamdulillah aku punya tim yang ngerti banget maunya aku. Aku suka banget sama hasil music videonya. Aku juga pakai tiga gaun, dan semuanya aku pilih sendiri. Best banget pokoknya,” tutup Lesti.

Dengan sentuhan khas Adibal Sahrul serta karakter vokal Lesti yang kuat, “Kura Kura Dalam Perahu” diharapkan dapat menjadi karya yang kembali melekat di hati para pecinta musik dangdut Indonesia.

بنتٍ حلاوة زينها سرمديّه

جعل الليالي في غلاها مِديّه

من عينها النظره تساوي ملايين

لى جيت أقلّب في هدايا المحبّين
أحتار شو باهدي لأغلى هديّه
وان جيت اباهديها من الشِعْر بيتين
أحسّها.. اكثر فتنه وْشاعريّه

كم شافت عيوني من الناس حلوين
لكن وربّي.. ما مِثلْها بنيّه
هالبنت فيها سِر.. حيّرني سنين
لا بدّ أعَرفه.. والمحبّه مديّه

snippet.title: ردة فعل رورو بعد ما شافت حسابها في ماب الكيبورد 🎉😏
snippet.description:
بعد ما أخذت حساب رورو في الفيديو السابق ورفعت مستواه بشكل كبير، رجعنا اليوم عشان نشوف ردة فعلها الحقيقية! 😱🔥

أنا ولولو قررنا نساعد رورو عشان تصير محترفة في ماب الكيبورد، لأن مستواها كان ما زال بعيد عن المراحل الصعبة. فاليوم بدأنا رحلة تدريب كاملة مليانة تحديات ومواقف مضحكة وكوارث ما كانت بالحسبان 😂

رورو كانت تحاول بكل قوتها تتجاوز العقبات وتقفز بين أزرار الكيبورد العملاقة، لكن كل شوي يصير لها موقف جديد يخرب الخطة 🤣

والأهم من كل هذا، كنا متحمسين نشوف ردة فعلها بعد ما اكتشفت وش صار بحسابها في الفيديو السابق وكيف قدرنا نرفع مستواه بشكل كبير! 😳🔥

فهل فرحت بالتطوير؟
ولا انصدمت من اللي سويناه بحسابها؟
وهل قدرت تثبت إنها صارت أقوى من قبل؟

شاهدوا الفيديو للنهاية لأن فيه مواقف تضحك بشكل مو طبيعي ومفاجآت كثيرة 😂❤️

لا تنسون اللايك والاشتراك وتفعيل الجرس 🔔❤️

snippet.title: Kenzy - Baad Hatha Al Omer | Lyrics Video 2026 | كنزي - بعد هذا العمر
snippet.description:
#Rotana2026 #Rotana #Kenzy
Kenzy - Baad Hatha Al Omer | Lyrics Video 2026 | كنزي - بعد هذا العمر 

 من ألبوم "وين سارح"
From "Wain Sareh" Album

✶ Lyrics : Abdallah Ben Faisal Ben Yazid | عبدالله بن فيصل بن يزيد
✶ Composition : Watar | وتر
✶ Arrangement : Hesham El Sakran | هشام السكران

اشترك على قناة روتانا | Subscribe To Rotana Channel
https://bit.ly/2NjviPh

✶ Lyrics | الكلمات

بعد هذا العمر كله كيف ياخلي لقيتك 
وما ابي اتجاوزك لحظه بعد هذا العمر كله 
 كيف قادر تمتلكني وكيف كنت وكيف جيتك 
انتا مستوعب شعوري كيف قادر تستحله 

انا من قلبي وروحي ياهوى عمري هويتك
شمس عمري ياحبيبي وانت حزاته وظله
كل لحظه ياحياتي مرت احساسي حييتك
للعذول ان قال شي ارجوك تكفى بس قله

كل لحظاتي معك وان غبت في لحظه سهيتك
والشعور اللي اعيشه ماذكر ان غيرك وصل له
اه لو تعرف في بالي كم وكم مره طريتك 
انت اساساً كل طاري منك منهو اللي يمله 

ان نويت اصد لحظه جيت بالبال وخذيتك 
لعنبو حي المشاعر مالها مذهب ومله 
صح انا واعي وعارف واعترف اني شريتك 
وكل درب ٍ في حياتي تعرفه زين وتدله


✶ https://www.facebook.com/rotanamusic/
✶ https://www.instagram.com/rotanamusic/
✶ https://twitter.com/RotanaMusic

snippet.title: Sana Di Na Lang Tayo Nagkakilala - Official Lyric Video | TJ HyperMusic
snippet.description:
**Sana Di Na Lang Tayo Nagkakilala - Official Lyric Video | TJ HyperMusic**

“Sana Di Na Lang Tayo Nagkakilala” is an emotional Filipino hugot rap song about betrayal, heartbreak, and the pain of loving someone who already had someone else in their heart.

This song is for the person who loved sincerely, fought until the end, and still ended up being left behind. It is about the anger, regret, and pain of realizing that while you were still fighting for the relationship, the other person was already slowly letting go.

Kung alam mo lang na ganito rin ang dulo, sana hindi mo na lang siya pinasok sa puso mo.

**Song Title:** Sana Di Na Lang Tayo Nagkakilala
**Artist:** TJ HyperMusic
**Type:** Official Lyric Video
**Genre:** Emotional Rap / Hugot Rap / OPM Rap / Filipino Breakup Song
